name: Raytracer — WebGPU compute (GPU)
description: The step-3 scene authored in Rae (buildScene/buildCamera), rendered by a WGSL compute shader on the GPU via browser WebGPU. Rae emits the scene as a flat f32 buffer; the host uploads it, dispatches one compute invocation per pixel (raytrace.wgsl), and blits the result to the canvas. The path toward a real-time, GPU-everywhere renderer.
